title: Device Home Screen - Disconnected device
scenario: Device Home Screen displays correct "Not Connected" state with greyed out elements when paired headset is powered off
steps: 1. Pair and connect the headset to the mobile device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen (Device Home page).
4. Turn off the headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power it off).
5. Observe the Home screen UI elements.
expected: The Home screen displays: Device Name (with an "i" info icon if applicable), a crossed red dot with "Not Connected" label, a greyed out device image, a "..." (more options) button, greyed out Battery icons, and firmware version "Version X.Y.Z".
